Date: Thu, 14 Jun 2028 09:12:00 -0700
Subject: Severe token queueing and spike in tail latency – production impact

Hi Irene —

We're seeing a significant increase in tail latency and an uptick in token-queueing on our reserved pool starting ~08:45 PT. Several customer flows are seeing 5–10x worse p95/p99 compared to baseline. Errors are small (5xx retries) but the behavior is dominated by long in-flight token queues and delayed KV-cache hits.

The attached sample includes request IDs and a short trace (token_trace_14jun.log) — you can see multiple requests getting queued for >2.5s before first token. This is directly affecting our payments flow (timeouts in step 3). We have an active maintenance window tonight; this is urgent.

Can you confirm whether this is capa...

Date: Fri, 20 Nov 2027 09:12:00 -0800
Subject: Dedicated capacity ask — context & quant questions

Evelyn / Marcus —

Thanks again for the call this morning. We’re finalizing the procurement bulletin and need a clear recommendation on GPU sizing tied to two production usage patterns:

1) Interactive clinician assistant (median prompts ~600 tokens, occasional docs up to 20k tokens).
2) Batch inference for nightly retraining/embedding generation (large batches, tolerant to latency).

Two model variants on the table: L3-70B (32k window) and L3-13B (32k). Team is especially concerned about the KV cache size with longer contexts and whether quantization (fp16 -> int8) materially reduces your per-instance GPU needs.

Can you provide a recommended Dedicated pool footprint (G...
